entries.purpose: Get list of gym owner testimonials for display on the landing page.
entries.response: { testimonials: [ { id: int, name: string, title: string, gym_name: string, photo_url: string, quote: string } ] }

entries.purpose: Get the details for each of the three subscription tiers for Pricing section.
entries.response: { tiers: [ { id: int, name: string, price_per_month: number, features: [string], cta_label: string } ] }

entries.purpose: Get all AI-powered features and descriptions for the Features section.
entries.response: { features: [ { id: int, icon: string, name: string, description: string } ] }

entries.purpose: Get a list of top FAQs and answers for gym owners.
entries.response: { faqs: [ { id: int, question: string, answer: string } ] }
